## devbox compose raw

Run docker compose directly with resolved file list and project name (escape hatch)

```
devbox compose raw [--bare] [-- docker-compose-args...] [flags]
```

```
  -h, --help   help for raw
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
  -c, --config string   path to devbox.yml (default "devbox.yml")
```
